positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_palace_italian
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    neapolitan_chronicles != palace_of_flies).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    translated_from_italian(neapolitan_chronicles)).

cnf(u14,negated_conjecture,
    ~translated_from_italian(palace_of_flies)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define published_by_new_vessel_press(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_english(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
